name: Medium Glass Bath Canister Brass - Threshold™: Elegant Storage Jar with Lid for Bathroom Organization, 43.9oz Capacity
description:
You're sure to love the functional style this Medium Glass Bath Canister from Threshold™ brings to your bathroom decor. This glass bath canister comes in handy for storing small makeup or grooming tools, accessories, cotton balls and more. Best of all, it comes with a lid to help keep the contents safe. Featuring a clear glass design with a ribbed exterior and a brass lid, it adds classic style to your bathroom decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
